overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a desert-city sidewalk at golden hour, approaching and crossing a busy intersection with the NCART transit wall visible against red rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with red rock mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past residential buildings with palm trees lining the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in same direction

entered.detail: large reddish-brown rock formation dominating the background
low-rise buildings with varied architecture lining the left side
scattered palm trees along the sidewalk and road edge
wooden utility pole with transformer and wires

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk in a residential area during golden hour. Red rock cliffs rise in the distance while modest houses and palm trees line the street. Sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic moves along the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching urban intersection with transit wall

events.description: sidewalk opens toward intersection revealing large NCART wall painted on cliff face

agents.ego_description: continuing along sidewalk approaching the intersection, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with backpack walking ahead toward intersection

entered.detail: massive concrete wall with NCART logo painted on cliff face
traffic signal gantry over the multi-lane road
zebra crossing markings at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wide intersection where the sidewalk opens up. The distinctive NCART transit wall becomes visible on the right, painted against the red rock cliff. Traffic lights and crosswalk markings appear as the character nears the street crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with heavy vehicle traffic

events.description: character steps into crosswalk and begins crossing multi-lane road with active traffic
camera pans left to observe passing traffic while continuing across intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane intersection while navigating through vehicle traffic

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving through the intersection
yellow taxi cab passing through the cross street

entered.detail: large industrial structure with pipes and scaffolding on left side of road
overhead traffic light structure spanning the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character enters the crosswalk and begins crossing the busy multi-lane intersection. Vehicles including a red sports car and yellow taxi pass through the intersection. The camera pans to survey the traffic while the NCART wall remains visible on the right and an industrial building appears on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: completing crossing with industrial district view

events.description: character continues across intersection approaching the far side sidewalk

agents.ego_description: finishing crossing the intersection while observing surrounding traffic and landscape

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving away from intersection

segments.scene_description: The character completes the crossing of the intersection, with the industrial building now prominent on the left. The NCART wall shifts to center view as the character approaches the far sidewalk. Traffic continues to flow through the intersection as the sun casts long shadows across the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet residential sidewalk toward a bustling urban intersection set against a desert backdrop. It begins with the character walking past modest houses and palm trees under a golden hour glow, with red rock cliffs looming in the distance. As the character advances, the sidewalk opens up to reveal a wide intersection and the distinctive NCART transit wall painted against the cliffs on the right. The scene then shifts as the character enters the crosswalk, moving through a flow of traffic featuring a red sports car and yellow taxi while the camera pans to include a prominent industrial building on the left. Finally, the camera completes the crossing, centering the NCART wall as long shadows stretch across the road toward the far sidewalk.
